happy.message: You always knew what the customer actually needed — not what they said they needed. That kind of empathy is something you can't train. It's just who you are!

sad.message: I keep thinking about all the calls we tag-teamed together. Going to miss that teamwork more than words can say.

miserable.message: However today is going, just know — you've helped so many people feel better. Now it's your turn to be looked after.
